creator: def@freebsd.org
text:
Of course I agree with the misspelling of encryptedcore.

Could you explain why would you prefer dumpno? dumpnr was used to make it consistent with kgdb(1) and crashinfo(8). I'd rather not change it without good reasons. FYI dumpno change would also require a change in sbin/decryptcore/decryptcore.c in usage().
